message.content:
```plantuml @startuml US031 - As Team Member, I want to create a task in a user story actor "TeamMember" as TM participant "CreateISTaskUI" as UI participant "CreateISTaskController" as Controller participant "Company" as Company participant "taskTypeStore : TaskTypeStore" as TTS participant "taskTypeList : List" as TTL participant "taskType : TaskType" as TT participant "pStore : ProjectStore" as PS participant "proj : Project" as P participant "sList : SprintList" as SL participant "sprint : Sprint" as S participant "sprintBacklog" as SB participant "UserStoryList" as USL participant "Usi" as USI participant "UiTaskList : TaskList" as UTL participant "taskList : List" as TL participant "task : Task" as T participant "projectTeam : ProjectTeam" as PT participant "projectTeam : List" as PTL participant "resource : Resource" as R participant "TaskMapper" as Mapper participant "createTaskDTO : CreateTaskDTO" as DTO participant "newIsTask : Task" as NIT == 1. Ask to create a task of a user story == TM -> UI: 1 Ask to create a task of a user story activate UI UI -> Controller: 2 getTaskTypes() activate Controller Controller -> Company: 3 getTaskTypeStore() activate Company Company --> Controller: 4 taskTypeStore deactivate Company Controller -> TTS: 5 getTaskTypesNames() activate TTS TTS -> TTL: 6 create() activate TTL TTL ..> TTL: taskTypesNames
: List loop (for each know task type) TTL -> TTL: 7 get(i) activate TTL TTL -> TT: 8 taskType activate TT TT -> TT: 9 getName() activate TT TT -> T: 10 typeName activate T T -> TTL: 11 add(typeName) deactivate T TTL --> TTL: 12 true deactivate TT deactivate TTL end loop TTL --> Controller: 13 taskTypesNames deactivate TTL deactivate TTS Controller --> UI: 14 taskTypesNames deactivate Controller UI --> TM: 15 Show a list of task types deactivate UI == 2. Select task type and get tasks == TM -> UI: 16 Selects task type activate UI UI -> Controller: 17 getIsTasks(projCode, sprintID, usID) activate Controller Controller -> PS: 18 getProjectStore() activate PS PS --> Controller: 19 pStore deactivate PS Controller -> P: 20 getProjectByCode(store.getCode()) activate P P --> Controller: 21 proj deactivate P Controller -> SL: 22 getSprintList() activate SL SL --> Controller: 23 sList deactivate SL Controller -> S: 24 getSprint(sprintID) activate S S --> Controller: 25 sprint deactivate S Controller -> SB: 26 getBacklog activate SB SB --> Controller: 27 sprintBacklog deactivate SB Controller -> USL: 28 getUserStoryList activate USL USL --> Controller: 29 usList deactivate USL Controller -> USI: 30 getUserStory(ID) activate USI USI --> Controller: 31 us deactivate USI Controller -> UTL: 32 getIsTaskList() activate UTL UTL --> Controller: 33 uiTaskList deactivate UTL Controller -> TL: 34 getTaskNames() activate TL TL -> TL: 35 create() activate TL TL ..> TL: tasksNames
: List loop (for each know task) TL -> TL: 36 get(i) activate TL TL -> T: 37 task activate T T -> T: 38 getName() activate T T -> T: 39 taskName activate T T -> TL: 40 add(taskName) deactivate T TL --> TL: 41 true deactivate T deactivate TL end loop TL --> Controller: 42 tasksNames deactivate TL deactivate Controller Controller --> UI: 43 tasksNames deactivate Controller UI --> TM: 44 Show a list of current tasks\n(no choose a precedence, if want) deactivate UI == 3. Select precedence (optional) == TM -> UI: 45 Selects precedence (optional) activate UI UI -> Controller: 46 getCurrentProjectTeam() activate Controller Controller -> P: 47 getProjectTeam() activate P P --> Controller: 48 projectTeam deactivate P Controller -> PTL: 49 getCurrentResourcesNames() activate PTL PTL -> PTL: 50 create() activate PTL PTL ..> PTL: currentResName
: List loop (for each know resource) PTL -> PTL: 51 get(i) activate PTL PTL -> R: 52 resource activate R R -> R: 53 isCurrent() activate R R --> PTL: 54 result deactivate R alt (result = true) PTL -> R: 55 getName() activate R R -> R: 56 resourceName activate R R -> PTL: 57 add(resourceName) deactivate R PTL --> PTL: 58 true deactivate R end alt deactivate PTL end loop PTL --> Controller: 59 currentResourcesNames deactivate PTL deactivate Controller Controller --> UI: 60 currentResourcesNames deactivate Controller UI --> TM: 61 Shows resource list and request data\n(Show, description, effortEstimate,\ntaskType, responsible) deactivate UI == 4. Choose and typed requested data == TM -> UI: 62 Choose and typed requested data activate UI UI -> Controller: 63 createIsTask(createIsTaskDTO) activate Controller Controller -> DTO: 64 createIsTask(createIsTaskDTO) activate DTO DTO -> Mapper: 65 toModel(createIsTaskDTO) activate Mapper Mapper -> Mapper: 66 name = getName() activate Mapper Mapper -> Mapper: 67 description = getDescription() activate Mapper Mapper -> Mapper: 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate() activate Mapper Mapper -> Mapper: 69 taskType = getTaskType() activate Mapper Mapper -> Mapper: 70 responsible = getResponsible() activate Mapper Mapper -> NIT: 71 createTask(name, description,\neffortEstimate, taskType, responsible) activate NIT NIT ..> NIT: newIsTask : Task deactivate NIT deactivate Mapper Mapper --> DTO: 72 newIsTask deactivate Mapper DTO -> DTO: 73 saveTask(newIsTask) activate DTO DTO -> DTO: 74 validate(newIsTask) activate DTO DTO --> DTO: 75 add(newIsTask) deactivate DTO DTO --> Controller: 76 true deactivate DTO deactivate Controller Controller --> UI: 77 created and saved successfully deactivate Controller UI --> TM: 78 created and saved successfully deactivate UI @enduml ```
